primary_catalyst.description: Profit-taking / streak-break session. Stocks dropped on concerns that US-Iran peace deal would not be struck before ceasefire expiration Wed Apr 22. S&P -0.63% to 7,064.01, Nasdaq -0.59%. AMD +~3% (diversification trade still in play), QCOM -1%. Google (April 22) announced two new in-house AI chips (Ironwood TPU v7) â€” custom silicon displacement narrative weighed on NVDA.

secondary_catalysts.description: Google unveiled 2 new AI chips (TPU Ironwood) positioned as NVDA competitor â€” custom silicon displacement headline (article dated Apr 22 but news flow likely ran into Apr 21)

force_attributions.rationale: Low-volume (-1.66 vol z) profit-taking after 10+ day streak; positioning unwind, not fundamental reversal
Google TPU v7 / Ironwood announcement re-engaged the custom silicon displacement narrative
Iran ceasefire expiration anxiety re-entered the tape ahead of Apr 22 deadline

notes: LOW priority. Profit-taking after big streak; TPU announcement from Google the fundamental kicker on the downside.
